sentences.arabic: يَسْتَخْدِمُ النَّاسُ الْهَوَاتِفَ الذَّكِيَّةَ فِي كُلِّ مَكَانٍ الْيَوْمَ.
sentences.translation: Ljudi danas svuda koriste pametne telefone.

sentences.arabic: تُسَاعِدُنَا هَذِهِ الْأَجْهِزَةُ فِي التَّوَاصُلِ مَعَ الْأَصْدِقَاءِ وَالْعَائِلَةِ بِسُهُولَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Ovi uređaji nam pomažu da lako komuniciramo s prijateljima i porodicom.
sentences.translationEn: These devices help us communicate with friends and family easily.

sentences.arabic: كَمَا نَسْتَطِيعُ الْبَحْثَ عَنِ الْمَعْلُومَاتِ وَقِرَاءَةَ الْأَخْبَارِ عَبْرَ الْإِنْتَرْنِتِ.
sentences.translation: Također možemo tražiti informacije i čitati vijesti putem interneta.
sentences.translationEn: We can also search for information and read news via the internet.

sentences.arabic: أَصْبَحَ الْهَاتِفُ جُزْءًا ضَرُورِيًّا مِنْ حَيَاتِنَا الْيَوْمِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Telefon je postao neophodan dio našeg svakodnevnog života.
sentences.translationEn: The phone has become a necessary part of our daily life.
